name: Song-I Han
description: Han Song-I is an E-Rank hunter who quit school after gaining money through the Yoo Jin-Ho and Sung Jin-Woo motley group of party. She is friends with Sung Jin-Ah. She first appeared when Jin-Ah visited Jin-Woo in the hospital but she didn't know him then.
mediaTitles: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-

name: Tetsuya Yuuki
description: Yuuki Tetsuya was the captain of the Seidou High School Baseball Team. He grew up in Tokyo Metropolis and graduated from Akadou Middle School. Observing the team's discipline, Yuuki decided to enroll at Seidou. During his Junior high however, he was not given much opportunity because of his small build despite his strong fighting spirit. He is called "Tetsu" by his peers.

name: Towa
description: Towa lives in his own studio on the third floor of Murase Clinic, and currently works as a receptionist in the clinic. In his free time, he likes hanging out in the bar, Roost. Towa also pretty much does painting as a hobby, and mainly paints oil paintings. However, he also does not paint often, and only picks up the brush when driven by an urge to it. Thus, there are times when he doesn't paint at all for a long period of time. His artist name is "euphoria". He likes to draw people's desires. C

name: Vysache
description: Emul's father and the chieftain of the race known as the Vorpal Bunnies. His physique—vastly larger and more formidable than that of any other Vorpal Bunny—possesses a sheer intensity that overawes all who behold it. Impressed by the strength and audacity of [Sunraku](https://anilist.co/character/271367/Rakurou-Hizutome)—who visited the Rabbit Kingdom, Rabituza, under [Emul's](https://anilist.co/character/281522/Emul) guidance—he subjects him to a series of various trials.

name: Yamamoto
description: Low-energy. Expressionless. Despite her looks, has fantastic grades. Thinks like a normal person. Actually has a part-time job. Puts a lot of effort in but tries to hide it. Hates annoying things but hangs out with Wada anyway. Kind of good at looking after people. Loves kids. Usually somewhat careless. Doesn't care about the internet, ignores social media. Names of celebrities and other people go in one ear and out the other (has absolutely zero interest).

name: Yoite
description: __Height:__ 180 cm A 16-year-old ninja in the Kairōshū who uses the forbidden technique "kira". This technique shoots the user's ki into the body of a target and controls it from the inside out, which can cause the target's bones to break or their body to completely explode. name: Yui Komori
description: __Race:__ Human __School Grade:__ 2nd year __Height:__ 158 cm Komori Yui is a normal girl who gets sent, by her father, to the Sakamaki brothers' house. She is a good-natured and sweet girl. Her dad works in a Church and she has the power to see ghosts. ~! Despite she is technically human, she has Cordelia's heart so is more like a dormant vampire. She is unaware of this though.!~

name: Anya Kudou
description: He is a fighter-game uploader, which suits his often angry, cynical and violent attitude. This attitude partially stems from his sleep disorder which gives him regular periods of insomnia, causing him to have to take sleeping pills most of the time and take up game streaming to get rid of boredom during the night. He eventually befriends Akatsuki, but quarrels a lot with Zakuro throughout the series.

name: Barbara Pegg
description: __Vision:__ Hydro Barbara is the deaconess of the Church of Favonius and a self-proclaimed "idol" after learning about them from the intrepid adventurer Alice.

nativeName: シャーロット・レイス

name: Chiyome
description: She looks like a ninja, a beast race with animal ears and a tail. A descendant of the Jinshin clan. She has infiltrated various places to release the oppressed beastmen, gathered information to rescue them. She met Arc and others when she was looking for information in a place elven were hold captive. She's looking for the whereabouts of her brother, Sasuke. "Chiyome" is not her real name, but one of the names inherited by excellent ninjas from generation to generation. Her real name is Mia.

name: Dal-Dal Choi
description: Choi Dal-Dal is a cute and bubbly young woman. She is the president of the Taekwondo club in Wild's High and has a friendly rivalry with Lee Mun-Yeong over martial arts and the attention of the series' protagonist, Song Jae-Gu.

name: Frill Shiranui
description: Frill Shiranui is a student in Ruby Hoshino's class. She is a multi-talented performer who can sing, dance, and act. At first, Ruby is in awe of her, yet they eventually become friends. ~!She is the younger sister of [Koromo Shiranui](https://anilist.co/character/212391/Koromo-Shiranui) from [Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai: Tensaitachi no Renai Zunousen](https://anilist.co/manga/86635/Kaguyasama-wa-Kokurasetai-Tensaitachi-no-Renai-Zunousen/).!~

name: Fudou Aikawa
description: Fudo Aikawa is the main character of the manga Love After World Domination. He is the Red Gelato and leader of the hero squad Gelato 5. He is also the strongest member among them.

name: Hiyori Tomoe
description: A distinguished son of the Tomoe Foundation. He works as one half of Eve alongside Jun Sazanami. His typically flippant lighthearted attitude belies his mature and nurturing side.
